title: Sheffield Forgemasters International Limited: annual report and accounts 2023/2024
body: "Sheffield Forgemasters International Limited’s (SFIL’s) annual report and accounts for the financial year ending 31 March 2024.  The report consists of a Strategic Report, Directors Report, Governance statement, Remuneration and Staff Report, and Statement of Accountable Person’s responsibilities.  The annual accounts consist of financial statements and notes to the accounts. "
